narrative:
Cols 34-F (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,342 registered voters, with 66.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 4.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 24.5 percentage points.
